heading: Taxation; exclusion from gross income
label: 277d–23 Taxation; exclusion from gross income
text: No amount received as an award under subsection a. and subsections b. (1) and (3) of shall be included in gross income for purposes of chapter 1 of title 26. However, amounts received under subsection b. (1) shall be included in gross income to the extent that such amounts are not used within one year of the receipt thereof to purchase replacement housing or facilities.section 277d–19 of this title
notes: Amendments1986— substituted “Internal Revenue Code of 1986” for “Internal Revenue Code of 1954”, which for purposes of codification was translated as “title 26” thus requiring no change in text.Pub. L. 99–514
amendments: Amendments1986— substituted “Internal Revenue Code of 1986” for “Internal Revenue Code of 1954”, which for purposes of codification was translated as “title 26” thus requiring no change in text.Pub. L. 99–514
